pages.text: Jets and valves drink $(thing)RF$(). No tech mods? The $(item)Pump House$() has you covered: feed it furnace fuel (one coal runs a long while), or just park it beside water for a slow trickle.$(br2)It glows while burning. Right-click for the gauge.
Water Conduits carry the power along your slide's spine. Any other RF mod's cables work too.

$(bold)Jets share power.$() Jets touching each other pass RF toward whichever neighbor holds less, hop by hop — wire $(bold)one$() jet in a row and the whole chain feeds itself. Flip a jet off with redstone to cut the chain there.
pages.title: Daisy-chaining
